title: Speech Unrestrictor
description: Prevents xbox account settings from disabling java edition chat
body:
This mod prevents your XBox account settings from preventing your ability to send and recieve chat messages. This is useful in situations where you cannot edit your xbox settings. Here is what the error that this mod prevents looks like: ![Image of the error prompt you get when trying to chat but your account disallows it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93ca1ceafbbb0efb35c0259f5bf0c228e4137136.png) This mod is currently untested. Report any bugs to the issue tracker. **Q: How?**
**A:** Its like 10 lines of code in a mixin thats it Feel free to read the source code if you want a more detailed explanation than that.
